title: Build audio-to-transcript pipeline
description: After recording ends, transcribe the WAV file to text. Research and choose best approach: local Whisper, AWS Transcribe, or Azure Speech-to-Text. Must produce transcript.json matching DATA-CONTRACT.md schema (entries with timestamp, speaker, text). Speaker diarization is nice-to-have (distinguish SE vs visitor). Upload transcript.json to S3 session folder when done.
tests: Feed 5-minute WAV -> transcript.json produced with correct schema
Empty/silent audio -> empty entries array, no error
Large file (60-minute recording) completes within 5 minutes
